title: Lemery Heat Wave
lead: Lemery is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +4.77. This anomaly has reached a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current weather conditions in Lemery are characterized by high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 15.7 GG. 
 The air is relatively humid, with an Umidita of 54%, and a gentle breeze of 7.1 km/h. 
 The Heating Degree Day (HDD) is at 0.0 GG, indicating no need for heating, while the CDD value suggests a high energy demand for cooling.
conclusion: Implement emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
